TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay_Mayhuman, title = Mayhuman, year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Atayal]}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/wiki/Mayhuman} }

S.FORM: alang Mayhuman ga niya mki sku Sincik Keng atu Gpho go, kwara sali buwan nya ga 68 buwan, 183 hi ku kwara s'uli tayan. s'uli tayan pinspngan Gyencumin ga 96% kyan ku 175 hi, binah ga, 'yat kahun sku pinspngan Gyencumin ga 4% kyan ku 8 hi nya. pinspung na linhuyan Gyencumin ga, Tayan 87%, saySiyat 7%, Cou 1%, binah lihuyan s'uli 1%. maki qu ngasal bziran, ngasal psatu tegami ru pqniqan iyu. rhzyal kki'an tay 'llaw na Mayhuman hya' ga llyung. tay 'zil na Mayhuman hya' ga rgyax krahu'. tay mkyahu' na Mayhuman hya' ga rgyax krahu'. tay mkraya' na Mayhuman hya' ga llyung. tay mkraya' na Mayhuman hya' ga Oro'raw. tay mkyahu' na Mayhuman hya' ga Mayl'ux. rekisi kayal kyokay maki 2 kyokay. ssquliq pinlpgan ppqbaqan pqwasan biru 'laqi' cikuy maki 1 pqwasan biru 'laqi' cikuy. pqwasan biru 'laqi' mrkyas tuqi 'san basu kisya' glgan spyangan na pinbahu Ubuy qqmayh

alang Mayhuman ga niya mki sku Sincik Keng atu Gpho go, kwara sali buwan nya ga 68 buwan, 183 hi ku kwara s'uli tayan. s'uli tayan pinspngan Gyencumin ga 96% kyan ku 175 hi, binah ga, 'yat kahun sku pinspngan Gyencumin ga 4% kyan ku 8 hi nya. pinspung na linhuyan Gyencumin ga, Tayan 87%, saySiyat 7%, Cou 1%, binah lihuyan s'uli 1%. maki qu ngasal bziran, ngasal psatu tegami ru pqniqan iyu. rhzyal kki'an tay 'llaw na Mayhuman hya' ga llyung. tay 'zil na Mayhuman hya' ga rgyax krahu'. tay mkyahu' na Mayhuman hya' ga rgyax krahu'. tay mkraya' na Mayhuman hya' ga llyung. tay mkraya' na Mayhuman hya' ga Oro'raw. tay mkyahu' na Mayhuman hya' ga Mayl'ux. rekisi kayal kyokay maki 2 kyokay. ssquliq pinlpgan ppqbaqan pqwasan biru 'laqi' cikuy maki 1 pqwasan biru 'laqi' cikuy. pqwasan biru 'laqi' mrkyas tuqi 'san basu kisya' glgan spyangan na pinbahu Ubuy qqmayh
S.PHON: alaŋ majħuman ɣa nija mki s~ɕku s~ɕinʦ~ʨik keŋ atu ɣpħo ɣo, kwara s~ɕali βuwan nja ɣa ** βuwan, *** ħi ku kwara s~ɕʔuli tajan. s~ɕʔuli tajan pins~ɕpŋan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa **% kjan ku *** ħi, βinaħ ɣa, ʔjat kaħun s~ɕku pins~ɕpŋan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa *% kjan ku * ħi nja. pins~ɕpuŋ na linħujan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa, tajan **%, s~ɕajs~ɕijat *%, ʦ~ʨou *%, βinaħ liħujan s~ɕʔuli *%. maki qu ŋas~ɕal βziran, ŋas~ɕal ps~ɕatu teɣami ru pqniqan iju. rħzjal kkiʔan taj ʔllaw na majħuman ħjaʔ ɣa lljuŋ. taj ʔzil na majħuman ħjaʔ ɣa rɣjax kraħuʔ. taj mkjaħuʔ na majħuman ħjaʔ ɣa rɣjax kraħuʔ. taj mkrajaʔ na majħuman ħjaʔ ɣa lljuŋ. taj mkrajaʔ na majħuman ħjaʔ ɣa oroʔraw. taj mkjaħuʔ na majħuman ħjaʔ ɣa majlʔux. rekis~ɕi kajal kjokaj maki * kjokaj. s~ɕs~ɕquliq pinlpɣan ppqβaqan pqwas~ɕan βiru ʔlaqiʔ ʦ~ʨikuj maki * pqwas~ɕan βiru ʔlaqiʔ ʦ~ʨikuj. pqwas~ɕan βiru ʔlaqiʔ mrkjas~ɕ tuqi ʔs~ɕan βas~ɕu kis~ɕjaʔ ɣlɣan s~ɕpjaŋan na pinβaħu uβuj qqmajħ
